name: codex-email-notify
description: Send an email whenever Codex completes a task by handling native notify payloads in Node.js.

interface.shortDescription: Emails you when Codex finishes a task.
interface.longDescription: A local Node.js plugin that turns Codex task-complete notifications into SMTP email alerts. The bundled notifier script supports both native notify payloads and Stop-hook payloads.
defaultPrompt: Send me an email when Codex finishes.
Notify me when a task completes.
Route Codex completion events to SMTP.
